subject: new folder to be set up

emails.subject: RE: New Folder to be set up
emails.subject_base: New Folder to be set up
emails.body: RE: New Folder to be set up John I have escalated Paige

emails.subject: RE: New Folder to be set up
emails.subject_base: New Folder to be set up
emails.body: Thanks. I have a question Paige, will I be able to create folders under this folder? If not then I need to send another request in. John

emails.subject: RE: New Folder to be set up
emails.subject_base: New Folder to be set up
emails.body: John, On the O drive you will not be allowed to create folders, as this is a common drive so all folders are created by IT (it was this way at Enron). The exception to this rule is if you are the owner of the "main" folder which in this case you are. So to make a long story short, YOU will be able to create folders under this path that we have requested, but your team members won't. They will have to request access to do so. Again, it's the same process as we used at Enron thank spc

emails.subject: RE: New Folder to be set up
emails.subject_base: New Folder to be set up
emails.body: Thanks, Will this folder be set up today? John

emails.subject: RE: New Folder to be set up
emails.subject_base: New Folder to be set up
emails.body: Will be completed by 1:30 (takes a while to copy these). Reminder you will have to copy the data into that folder structure that you want to take with you thanks spc
